milestone: View Mode gaps closed — Aspect Ratio dropdown, Reset Workspace Layout
slice: Two controls were still usable while an Official World was open in View Mode: the Scene Header's Aspect Ratio dropdown (hand-built outside the shared _select() helper that already gates read-only, so it was never disabled) and the overflow menu's Reset Workspace Layout (previously left enabled on purpose, since it only touches a local preference -- now disabled alongside Delete since it still reads as "you can change something" on a read-only World). Both gained visible :disabled styling so they read as clearly inert.
